titles.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of a Woman Whose Husband Has Passed Away
Chapter on the Inheritance of a Woman Whose Husband Has Passed Away

segments: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَتَزَوَّجُ اَلْمَرْأَةَ ثُمَّ يَمُوتُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ بِهَا فَقَالَ "لَهَا اَلْمِيرَاثُ كَامِلاً وَ عَلَيْهَا اَلْعِدَّةُ أَرْبَعَةُ أَشْهُرٍ وَ عَشْراً وَ إِنْ كَانَ سَمَّى لَهَا مَهْراً يَعْنِي صَدَاقاً فَلَهَا نِصْفُهُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ سَمَّى لَهَا مَهْراً فَلاَ مَهْرَ لَهَا".
arabic.text: : سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَتَزَوَّجُ اَلْمَرْأَةَ ثُمَّ يَمُوتُ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَدْخُلَ بِهَا فَقَالَ "لَهَا اَلْمِيرَاثُ كَامِلاً وَ عَلَيْهَا اَلْعِدَّةُ أَرْبَعَةُ أَشْهُرٍ وَ عَشْراً وَ إِنْ كَانَ سَمَّى لَهَا مَهْراً يَعْنِي صَدَاقاً فَلَهَا نِصْفُهُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ سَمَّى لَهَا مَهْراً فَلاَ مَهْرَ لَهَا".

segments:
Hadith.5671 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Al-Ala, from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said: I asked Imam (as) about a man who marries a woman and then dies before consummating the marriage with her.
Imam (as) said: "She is entitled to the full inheritance, and she must observe the waiting period (iddah) of four months and ten days. If he had specified a dowry (mahr) for her, she is entitled to half of it. However, if he had not specified a dowry, then she is not entitled to any dowry."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5671 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Al-Ala, from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said: I asked Imam (as) about a man who marries a woman and then dies before consummating the marriage with her.
Imam (as) said: "She is entitled to the full inheritance, and she must observe the waiting period (iddah) of four months and ten days. If he had specified a dowry (mahr) for her, she is entitled to half of it. However, if he had not specified a dowry, then she is not entitled to any dowry."

narratorChain.raw: 5671 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ اَلْعَلاَءِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ

titles.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of a Woman Whose Husband Has Passed Away

segments: 5672 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ : "إِنْ كَانَ دَخَلَ بِهَا فَلَهَا اَلصَّدَاقُ كَامِلاً".
arabic.text: 5672 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي حَدِيثٍ آخَرَ : "إِنْ كَانَ دَخَلَ بِهَا فَلَهَا اَلصَّدَاقُ كَامِلاً".

segments:
Hadith.5672 - And Imam (as) said in another narration:
"If he had consummated the marriage with her, then she is entitled to the full dowry (ṣadaq)."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5672 - And Imam (as) said in another narration:
"If he had consummated the marriage with her, then she is entitled to the full dowry (ṣadaq)."

titles.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of a Woman Whose Husband Has Passed Away

segments: : قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ تَزَوَّجَ اِمْرَأَةً بِحُكْمِهَا فَمَاتَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَحْكُمَ قَالَ "لَيْسَ لَهَا صَدَاقٌ وَ هِيَ تَرِثُهُ".
arabic.text: : قُلْتُ لَهُ رَجُلٌ تَزَوَّجَ اِمْرَأَةً بِحُكْمِهَا فَمَاتَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَحْكُمَ قَالَ "لَيْسَ لَهَا صَدَاقٌ وَ هِيَ تَرِثُهُ".

segments:
Hadith.5673 - Ibn Abi Nasr narrated from Abdul Karim ibn Amr, from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
I asked Imam (as) about a man who married a woman according to her own condition (by her terms), but he died before she could set the conditions.
Imam (as) said: "She is not entitled to a dowry (ṣadaq), but she inherits from him."
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text:
Hadith.5673 - Ibn Abi Nasr narrated from Abdul Karim ibn Amr, from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as), who said:
I asked Imam (as) about a man who married a woman according to her own condition (by her terms), but he died before she could set the conditions.
Imam (as) said: "She is not entitled to a dowry (ṣadaq), but she inherits from him."

narratorChain.raw: 5673 - وَ رَوَى اِبْنُ أَبِي نَصْرٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اَلْكَرِيمِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ
